sections.name: Invoice Details
sections.description: Contains the invoice number and date.

sections.name: Sender Information
sections.description: Details of the company issuing the invoice, including name, address, contact numbers, and email.

sections.name: Recipient Information
sections.description: Details of the entity receiving the invoice, including name and address.

sections.name: Line Items
sections.description: A list of products with their quantity, unit price, and total price.

sections.name: Summary Totals
sections.description: Financial summary including subtotal, sales tax, and total amount due.

sections.name: Shipping Information
sections.description: Details regarding the shipping address for the order.

sections.name: Payment Terms
sections.description: Information about when the payment is due.

sections.name: Instructions
sections.description: Any special instructions related to the invoice or order.

sections.name: Greeting
sections.description: A concluding message from the sender.
